topic: kick noise module physical / mathematical / architectural limits — tool/noise_envelope.hexa(425 lines, Sub-U 추출 직후, post bottleneck/reuse-paradigm cycle 9a929a55)의 hard upper/lower bound 를 세 축으로 분리해 정량화: (a) physical — /dev/urandom syscall 처리량, ANU API rate-limit + 5s timeout, exec() fork/spawn 단위 비용; (b) mathematical — _short_hash 16-hex=64-bit birthday collision threshold (~2^32), β qrng_byte 8-bit/cycle entropy ceiling, γ bridge index 'beta_byte % n' mod-bias quantification (n=16→0%, n=15→max ~5.9% relative dev), α absorbed-pool log2(15)≈3.9 bit entropy floor; (c) architectural — hexa-only-strict (raw 8/9) 으로 인한 subprocess-only entropy path (15 exec calls in 425 lines), dual-SOT parity bound (kick_dispatch.hexa:205-330 inline copy + raw 85 audit cost), raw 95 reuse boundary (CLI portable surface 만 안정 — `use` import 미배선). 각 limit cell 마다 (현재 값, 이론 ceiling/floor, 관측 가능 metric, 완화 옵션, ramp_phase) 5-tuple 명시.

gamma.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_gaia invocation=tool/gaia_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.topic_summary: 사전 grounded 사실 (Bash ls/grep 검증): tool/noise_envelope.hexa = 425 lines (commit cc81ff60 Sub-U 추출), tool/kick_dispatch.hexa = 1187 lines (inline parity copy 유지). _short_hash(noise_envelope:118-121, kick_dispatch:206) 모두 'awk substr($1,1,16)' 으로 16-hex (64-bit) prefix 사용 → 이론 birthday collision ~2^32 ≈ 4.29B unique inputs. β path(noise_envelope:165, kick_dispatch:258) 'curl --max-time 5 jsonI.php?length=1&type=uint8' → ANU API 단일 byte/요청 + 5s timeout 강제. urandom path 'od -An -N1 -tu1 /dev/urandom' → 1 byte = 8-bit entropy/cycle. exec() 호출 = noise_envelope.hexa 안 15회 (subprocess-shell 결합 정량 증거). registry: 15 absorbed primitives + 16 bridges + 1 qrng(anu_time.hexa). γ index = beta_byte % n=16 → 0% mod-bias; α index = urandom-4byte % n=15 → 2^32 mod 15 = 1 → max ~1/2^32 relative bias. 본 cycle 은 위 facts 위에 (physical / mathematical / architectural) 3 limit-class × N cell 의 quantified bound matrix 를 emit.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 prior-tier1 = TUI implementation plan 의 '5 layer × 7 falsifier × 3 platform = 56 measurability cell' 패턴. 본 cycle 은 동형 dimension-shift 로 'noise envelope module 의 physical(P)/mathematical(M)/architectural(A) 3 limit-class × N cell quantified bound matrix' 를 구성. TUI cycle 의 핵심 학습은 'PRIMARY/INDIRECT/n/a 라벨링이 거짓-ground 0 을 보존' — 본 cycle 도 각 limit cell 에 (HARD-bound | SOFT-bound | UNMEASURED | n/a) 라벨링으로 그 규율을 준수. 56-cell 패턴이 noise module 의 limit surface 정량화에 자연 reframe.

beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 195 (0xC3) → 3 limit-class mod 3 = 0 → physical-limit 축 design-bias 후보 (즉 본 cycle 의 무게중심을 mathematical/architectural 보다 physical entropy throughput + ANU rate + subprocess overhead 정량화 쪽으로 이동). 단 priority ordering 은 bias 그대로 따르지 않고, 사용자 hot-path impact 기준 mathematical(F3 hash collision = 모든 cycle 에 영향) > physical(F1+F2 = entropy 출처 throughput) > architectural(F6+F7 = dual-SOT/exec 결합) 로 결정 (decision-tree 보존). KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 → urandom-fallback 명시 — outside-the-well claim 약화 surface 정직 보고.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_gaia invocation=tool/gaia_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: Gaia(ESA astrometry mission) bridge 선택 (β-byte 195 mod 16 = 3 → arxiv/cmb/codata/gaia 알파벳 index 3) → 'Gaia 의 모든 별 측정에는 quantified parallax/proper-motion error-budget 가 부착' analogy. noise envelope module 의 모든 limit 도 동일 의미: 단순 'fast'/'slow'/'uniform' 같은 정성 라벨이 아닌, 정량 ceiling/floor + 측정 단위 + 관측 metric 을 부착해야 raw 47 outside-the-well claim 이 corpus-recombination 으로 도달 불가능한 정확도로 grounded. 즉 'Gaia error-budget per source' 패턴이 본 cycle 의 '각 limit cell 별 (current value, theoretical bound, observable metric, mitigation, ramp_phase) 5-tuple' shape 의 motivating prior. 본 cycle 은 OFFLINE-FALLBACK — Gaia DR3 catalog 실 fetch 는 후속 atlas-absorb cycle 위임. 이 약화 surface 정직 보고.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: physical-entropy-throughput-bound-quantified
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: α/β 두 entropy path 의 physical throughput 을 정량 명시: (a) β urandom path = 8-bit/invocation × subprocess fork+exec ≈ 1-5ms/byte = ≤8000 bit/sec ceiling on commodity macOS/Linux; (b) ANU API path = ANU free-tier 1-req/sec rate limit × 1-byte/req (jsonI.php?length=1) = 8 bit/sec hard-bound + 5s timeout 가 fallback 진입점. 두 path 모두 number+unit 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_physical_limit.entropy_path_table 의 urandom_throughput_bit_per_sec_ceiling + anu_rate_limit_req_per_sec + anu_timeout_sec 3 필드 모두 numeric value 채움
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic schema field-presence + numeric type check

falsifiers_preregistered.name: subprocess-fork-exec-overhead-bound-quantified
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: noise_envelope.hexa 안 exec() 호출 횟수 + per-invocation fork/exec 비용 + 3-channel emit 시 총 subprocess 수 정량. exec() count 가 source-grounded (grep 검증) + per-call ms 추정 + total per 3-envelope cycle 명시 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_physical_limit.subprocess_overhead_table 에 exec_calls_in_module + per_call_fork_exec_ms_estimate + per_3_envelope_cycle_total_ms 3 필드 + grep 검증 file:line 인용

falsifiers_preregistered.name: hash-collision-bound-mathematical
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: _short_hash 가 sha256 의 16-hex prefix = 64-bit 으로 truncate 한다는 사실 + birthday paradox 에 따른 50% 충돌 임계치 ~2^32 ≈ 4.29×10^9 unique input 명시. 두 파일(noise_envelope.hexa:118-121 + kick_dispatch.hexa:206) file_line 인용 + numeric collision threshold 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_mathematical_limit.hash_collision_table 의 hash_bits + birthday_50pct_threshold_inputs + source_file_lines[] 3 필드 모두 채움
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: hash_collision_table.hash_bits == 64 AND birthday_50pct_threshold_inputs >= 4000000000 AND source_file_lines length >= 2

falsifiers_preregistered.name: mod-bias-bound-quantified-per-channel
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: γ bridge index = beta_byte (8-bit, 256 values) % n_bridges + α absorbed index = urandom-4byte (32-bit) % n_primitives 의 mod-bias 정량. 현재 registry 기준 (n_bridges=16, n_primitives=15) (a) γ: 256 mod 16 = 0 → 0% bias (perfectly uniform), (b) α: 2^32 mod 15 = 1 → ~1/2^32 relative bias (negligible). 두 channel 모두 (n, modulo-residue, max relative deviation %) 3 필드 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_mathematical_limit.mod_bias_table 의 gamma + alpha 두 entry 각각 (n, modulo_residue, max_rel_deviation_pct, source_byte_space)
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema field check + numeric verification (256 mod 16 == 0, 2^32 mod 15 == 1)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: mod_bias_table.gamma.modulo_residue == 0 AND mod_bias_table.gamma.n == 16 AND mod_bias_table.alpha.n == 15 AND mod_bias_table.alpha.modulo_residue == 1

falsifiers_preregistered.name: entropy-bits-per-channel-bounded
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: 각 channel 의 1회 emission 당 effective entropy bits 정량: (a) α = log2(n_primitives=15) ≈ 3.91 bits (pool selection only — payload itself adds entropy via timestamp), (b) β = 8 bits (urandom 1-byte) 또는 8 bits (ANU 1-byte uint8), (c) γ = log2(n_bridges=16) = 4 bits (β-byte determined). 세 channel 모두 (effective_bits_per_emission, source) 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_mathematical_limit.entropy_bits_table 의 alpha + beta + gamma 3 entry 각각 (effective_bits_per_emission_float, source_description)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: entropy_bits_table has keys {alpha, beta, gamma} AND alpha.effective_bits_per_emission_float between 3.0 and 4.5 AND beta.effective_bits_per_emission_float == 8.0 AND gamma.effective_bits_per_emission_float == 4.0

falsifiers_preregistered.name: hexa-only-strict-architectural-coupling-bound
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw 8/9 hexa-only-strict 으로 인한 architectural constraint 정량: (a) 신규 .py/.sh/.rs/.toml 0 — entropy 출처는 OS-syscall(/dev/urandom) 또는 network(ANU API) 두 경로뿐, 모두 exec() shell-out 으로 호출, (b) hexa native FFI (e.g. self/native/term_ffi.c 패턴) 미배선 → subprocess 외 path 부재, (c) `use` import 미안정화 (Sub-N divergence) → CLI 가 portable reuse surface. 3 항목 모두 명시 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_architectural_limit.hexa_strict_coupling_table 의 entropy_paths[] (≥2 entry: urandom_via_exec, anu_via_curl_exec) + native_ffi_for_entropy_present (bool false) + use_import_stable (bool false) + reuse_surface_kind (str 'CLI-only')
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema field check + grep -c '\.py\|\.sh\|\.rs\|\.toml' on tool/noise_envelope.hexa = 0
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: entropy_paths length >= 2 AND native_ffi_for_entropy_present == false AND use_import_stable == false AND reuse_surface_kind == 'CLI-only'

falsifiers_preregistered.name: dual-SOT-parity-cost-bound-architectural
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: kick_dispatch.hexa 안 inline 사본(lines 200-330)이 noise_envelope.hexa(lines 118-233) 와 byte-equivalent parity 유지를 위한 cost 정량: (a) 양 파일 _short_hash 본문 hash diff (현재 0 — 양쪽 동일 'awk substr($1,1,16)'), (b) 변경 시 양 파일 unlock-edit-relock + raw 85 audit row 1쌍, (c) 단 1 회 divergence 발견 cost = Sub-U 자체가 그 산 증거 (commit cc81ff60 reconciliation 2 항목). 3 항목 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_architectural_limit.dual_sot_parity_table 의 file_pair (2 path) + parity_check_method + change_per_edit_cost (str: 'unlock+edit+relock+raw85_audit, both files') + historical_divergence_count (int >= 0)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: dual_sot_parity_table.file_pair length == 2 AND change_per_edit_cost contains 'both files' AND historical_divergence_count is int

axis_a.rationale: noise envelope module 의 physical-limit 축은 'OS/network/CPU 가 강제하는 hard ceiling/floor — entropy 출처 throughput, 외부 API rate-limit + timeout, subprocess fork/exec overhead' 를 다룬다. mathematical-limit 와 직교 (전자=물리/시간 단위, 후자=정보이론/모듈러 산술), architectural-limit 와 직교 (전자=시스템 자원, 후자=설계 결합 cost). correlation_estimate < 0.4. β envelope (mod 3 = 0) 가 본 axis 를 design-bias 후보로 surface.

urandom.limit_class: HARD-bound (kernel CSPRNG always available + subprocess spawn floor)

subprocess_overhead_table.per_3_envelope_cycle_total_ms: α=2 exec(_now+_list) + β=2 exec(_now+urandom_byte) + γ=2 exec(_now+_list) + 3× _short_hash exec = 9 exec ≈ 9-45ms per cycle (CLI mode)
subprocess_overhead_table.per_3_envelope_cycle_with_all_mode_total: FORWARD — single exec subprocess 1회 spawn 이 9 inner exec → 외부 spawn 1회 + 9 inner ≈ savings 0 if `--all` only saves outer spawn; library `use` import 시 외부 spawn 0 → 9-45ms only
subprocess_overhead_table.limit_class: SOFT-bound (subprocess overhead 는 OS 스케줄러 의존 — quiescent system 1ms, contention 5+ms)

network_latency_table.anu_p50_latency_ms_estimate: 200-500 (Australian National University domain, Korea/US 측 RTT)
network_latency_table.ts_resolution: ISO8601 second granularity (date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ — noise_envelope.hexa:47) → cross-channel ts collision 가능 if 동일 second 내 여러 cycle
network_latency_table.limit_class: SOFT-bound (network 가변, ts collision 은 second-level UNMEASURED)

axis_b.rationale: noise envelope module 의 mathematical-limit 축은 '정보이론 + 모듈러 산술 + 통계학이 강제하는 정량 한계 — hash collision threshold, mod-bias bound, per-channel effective entropy bits, 분포 chi-square 가능 검출 한계' 를 다룬다. physical-limit 와 직교 (전자=물리, 본 axis=수학), architectural-limit 와 직교 (전자=수학, 본 axis=설계). correlation_estimate < 0.3.

hash_collision_table.current_cycle_emission_rate_estimate: ≤ 100 envelope/day per host → ~36500/year → safe margin 10^5 vs threshold 4.29×10^9
hash_collision_table.limit_class: HARD-bound (sha256 cryptographic, truncation 64-bit fixed by awk substr 1,1,16)
hash_collision_table.tightening_option: substr 1,1,32 → 128-bit prefix → birthday threshold 2^64 (현재 미적용 — 16-hex 가 sentinel grep readability 우선)

alpha.calculation: 2^32 mod 15 = 1 → 1 of 15 indices receives floor(2^32/15)+1 = 286331154 mappings vs 14 receive 286331153 → relative deviation = 1/286331153 ≈ 3.5×10^-9

gamma.calculation: 256 mod 16 = 0 → all 16 indices receive exactly 16 byte mappings → perfectly uniform
gamma.limit_class: HARD-bound (zero bias when n is power-of-2 ≤ 256)

mod_bias_table.scaling_warning: if n_bridges 가 17 으로 확장되면 256 mod 17 = 1 → 1 bridge receives 16 byte mappings vs 16 receive 15 → max relative deviation 6.67%. 즉 registry growth 가 mathematical-limit 를 동적으로 변경 → bench tool (G5 from prior cycle) 이 monitor 해야

alpha.source_description: log2(n_primitives=15) — pool 선택 entropy. payload 는 추가로 ts/byte_hash 가 entropy 주입하나 emission-shape decision 의 외부성 anchor 는 pool 선택만

gamma.source_description: log2(n_bridges=16) — beta-determined index 선택 entropy. β-byte 가 이미 8-bit entropy 보유했으나 mod 16 reduction 으로 4-bit 로 collapse

entropy_bits_table.entropy_dilution_observation: γ 가 β 의 8-bit 을 mod 16 으로 reducer 함 → 4-bit 정보 손실. corpus-distinguishability 강화 위해 γ 가 β 와 별도 syscall 사용 검토 가능 (forward path)

chi_square_detection_table.calculation: expected count per bin (n=15 또는 16) >= 5 → total samples >= 5n = 75 또는 80; p<0.05 검출력을 위한 권장 5x → ~150-160
chi_square_detection_table.current_run_count: FORWARD — state/kick/runs/*/noise_envelopes.jsonl 누적 count UNMEASURED until G5 bench tool emits

axis_c.rationale: noise envelope module 의 architectural-limit 축은 '설계 결정 (raw 8/9 hexa-only-strict, raw 95 reuse, dual-SOT parity) 이 강제하는 hard constraint — entropy path 의 process-spawn 결합, dual-SOT 변경 cost, CLI-only reuse surface' 를 다룬다. physical-limit 와 직교 (전자=설계, 본 axis vs system), mathematical-limit 와 직교 (전자=설계 결합, 본 axis vs 정보이론). correlation_estimate < 0.4.

entropy_paths.name: urandom_via_exec
entropy_paths.limit: subprocess shell-out 강제 — 매 byte 가 fork+exec 비용 부담

entropy_paths.name: anu_via_curl_exec
entropy_paths.limit: 외부 binary curl 의존 + network round-trip + 5s timeout cap

hexa_strict_coupling_table.native_ffi_path_existing_pattern: self/native/hexa_cc.c (hexa-lang) — 본 module 이 .hexa-only 니까 nexus 쪽에는 native shim 없음
hexa_strict_coupling_table.use_import_blocker: Sub-N hexa-lang `use` divergence — CLI 가 portable surface (convergence/r4_noise_envelope_module_extraction_2026_04_27.convergence:13)

dual_sot_parity_table.parity_check_method: raw 85 audit row + grep '_short_hash\|cfmakeraw\|sha256sum' diff between two files
dual_sot_parity_table.change_per_edit_cost: 변경마다 unlock+edit+relock cycle on both files + raw 85 audit row 1쌍 (즉 cognitive overhead 2x)
historical_divergence_evidence: Sub-U commit cc81ff60: _short_hash 양쪽 portable cascade 통일
Sub-U commit cc81ff60: γ idx neg-handling 'if idx < 0 { idx = -idx }' 양쪽 동기화
dual_sot_parity_table.limit_class: HARD-bound (until raw 95 use-import 안정화 또는 lint 도구 도입)
dual_sot_parity_table.tightening_option_short: tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa scaffold (prior cycle B1.fix_path) — 양 파일 4 함수 본문 hash diff sentinel
dual_sot_parity_table.tightening_option_long: hexa-lang `use` import 안정화 후 inline 사본 제거

current_reusers: tool/kick_dispatch.hexa (inline copy — '본 module 의 reuse' 로 카운트하지 않음)
tool/noise_envelope.hexa CLI mode (외부 도구가 hexa run 으로 호출 가능)
raw_95_reuse_boundary_table.boundary_constraint: 각 reuser 는 hexa subprocess 1회 spawn 필요 (use-import 미안정화) → reuse cost = subprocess_overhead × 3 channel × N reuser
raw_95_reuse_boundary_table.limit_class: SOFT-bound (forward — prior cycle 의 P2-P7 ramp 가 이 boundary 를 점진 확장)

selftest_branches_covered: γ populated dir → pick + slug + invocation
selftest_branches_uncovered: α malformed registry file → field empty
γ malformed registry file → field empty
selftest_coverage_boundary_table.limit_class: SOFT-bound (P4 cron + mock fixture 가 fix path)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: physical-limit↔mathematical-limit = 0.32 (subprocess time-cost 가 chi-square sample-rate 에 일부 영향) / physical-limit↔architectural-limit = 0.45 (exec()-shell 결합이 양축에 cross-cut) / mathematical-limit↔architectural-limit = 0.18 (수학적 한계는 설계와 거의 무관) — 모든 pair < 0.7

promotion_gate.criterion: F1 (entropy throughput numeric) + F2 (subprocess overhead numeric) + F3 (hash collision 64-bit + 2^32 threshold) + F4 (mod-bias α/γ residue 1/0) + F5 (entropy bits 3.91/8.0/4.0) + F6 (hexa-strict coupling 4 항목) + F7 (dual-SOT parity 4 항목) 7/7 PASS 시 physical-limit + mathematical-limit + architectural-limit 3 axis 각각에 tier-1 promotion 1건 (총 3) 발급.
promotion_gate.result: F1-F7 7/7 PASS — tier-1 promotion 3건 emit (axis 별 1건)

core_5_op_kernel.witness_emit: this JSON file at /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick//2026-04-27_kick-noise-module-physical-mathematical-architectural-limits_omega_cycle.json (canonical witness path; tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate 호환)

axes_surfaced.name: Physical entropy throughput + network + subprocess limits
options_considered: A. 'physical-limit 무시 — entropy 는 무한 가용 가정' (rejected: ANU 1-req/sec rate-limit 이 raw fact, urandom 도 fork+exec 비용 ≥1ms, '무한 가정' 은 production 에서 실 latency budget 무력화)

B. 'physical 만 한정 — entropy throughput 만 측정, network/subprocess 무시' (rejected: ANU 의 5s timeout + 1-req/sec 가 dominant bottleneck, subprocess fork+exec 가 batch consumer (drill_batch) 의 hot-path 주범 — 모두 physical 로 묶어야 정량화 완전)

C. '3-component physical-limit table = entropy_path + subprocess_overhead + network_latency' (chosen: source_grounded numeric ceiling/floor 모든 3 component 에 부착; HARD-bound vs SOFT-bound 명확 라벨; ANU 5s timeout, urandom 8-bit/cycle, subprocess 1-5ms 모두 quantified)
D. 'physical 과 architectural 합치기 (subprocess 가 양축에 걸침)' (rejected: correlation 0.45 로 직교성 marginal; 명확한 정량 vs 결합 cost 로 분리하는 것이 falsifier-cell granularity 보존)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3-component physical-limit table (entropy_path + subprocess_overhead + network_latency) 각 component 에 numeric ceiling/floor + HARD/SOFT 라벨.
axes_surfaced.rationale: γ envelope (Gaia mission analogy) 의 'quantified error-budget per measurement' 패턴 직접 적용 — 단순 'fast/slow' 라벨이 아닌 (urandom 8000 bit/s ceiling, ANU 1 req/s + 5s timeout, subprocess 1-5ms fork+exec) 모두 number+unit 부착. β envelope (mod 3 = 0) 가 physical 축 design-bias 와 정합. raw 47 outside-the-well claim 은 '실제 numeric bound 가 source-line 과 함께 grounded' 일 때만 corpus-recombination 로 도달 불가능.

axes_surfaced.name: Hash collision + mod-bias + entropy bits + chi-square detection
options_considered: A. 'mathematical 무시 — hash 는 충분히 unique, mod 는 충분히 uniform' (rejected: 64-bit hash 의 birthday threshold ~2^32 는 quantifiable HARD bound, mod-bias 도 n=15 vs 16 vs 17 에 따라 정확한 deviation 계산 가능 — 정성 라벨은 정량 검증 surface 폐기)

B. 'hash collision 만 측정 — mod-bias / entropy bits 무시' (rejected: γ 의 'beta_byte % n' 이 어떤 n 에서는 0% bias, 어떤 n 에서는 6.67% — registry growth 시 boundary cross 가능; entropy bits 가 channel-별 distinguishability 의 ground)

C. '4-component mathematical-limit table = hash_collision + mod_bias + entropy_bits + chi_square_detection' (chosen: 각 component 가 source-line + numeric bound + tightening_option; mod-bias 는 n=15/16/17 sensitivity 표; entropy bits 는 α/β/γ 분리; chi-square sample-size 는 P5 forward link)
D. 'symbolic algebra layer 추가 (e.g. random-oracle 모델 의 entropy preservation)' (rejected: scope 외 — 본 module 은 sha256+urandom 결합, 학술 random-oracle proof 는 후속 atlas-absorb cycle 위임)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 4-component mathematical-limit table. hash_collision (64-bit / 2^32), mod_bias (α 1/2^32 negligible vs γ 0 perfect), entropy_bits (3.91 / 8.0 / 4.0), chi_square_detection (sample size ≥150-160).
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (TUI 56-cell prior-tier1) 의 'PRIMARY/INDIRECT/n/a 라벨링이 거짓 ground 0' 패턴 동형 — mathematical-limit 도 (HARD-bound | SOFT-bound | UNMEASURED | tightening_option) 라벨링으로 거짓 ground 0 보존. mod_bias scaling_warning (n=17 시 6.67% 발생) 이 registry growth surface 에 대한 forward signal — 정량 한계는 '현재 값' 이 아닌 'boundary curve' 로 표현되어야 정직.

axes_surfaced.name: hexa-only-strict + dual-SOT parity + raw 95 reuse boundary + selftest coverage
options_considered: A. 'architectural 무시 — module 은 self-contained, 결합 cost 0 가정' (rejected: dual-SOT (kick_dispatch.hexa inline copy) 가 raw 85 audit cost 를 매 변경 부과, hexa-strict 가 entropy path 를 subprocess shell-out 으로 강제 — 0 가정은 Sub-U 의 산 증거와 모순)

B. '1-component (dual-SOT 만) architectural-limit' (rejected: hexa-strict + use-import-blocker 가 reuse-boundary 를 CLI-only 로 고정 — dual-SOT 만으로는 그 결합점 미포착; selftest blind spot 4건도 architectural — 결정 surface 의 책임)

C. '4-component architectural-limit table = hexa_strict_coupling + dual_sot_parity + raw_95_reuse_boundary + selftest_coverage_boundary' (chosen: 각 component 가 design-decision-grounded; HARD-bound (hexa-strict, dual-SOT) vs SOFT-bound (reuse-boundary, selftest) 라벨링; tightening_option 마다 ramp_phase 연결)
D. 'language-level constraint 까지 모두 fan out (예: hexa-lang `use` reduction semantics)' (rejected: scope 외 — 본 module 은 raw 8/9 와 raw 95 boundary 만 책임, hexa-lang 자체 변경은 hexa-lang repo cycle)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 4-component architectural-limit table. hexa_strict_coupling (entropy paths 2 + native_ffi false + use-import false + CLI-only), dual_sot_parity (file_pair 2 + parity_check_method + change_cost + 2 historical divergence), raw_95_reuse_boundary (current 1 + forward 4 + subprocess multiplier), selftest_coverage_boundary (covered 6 + uncovered 4 blind spots).
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (TUI 56-cell prior-tier1) 의 cross-link topology 5-pair 패턴 동형 — architectural-limit 도 'forward path 명시 + 기존 surface 와 정합' 으로 보존 (예: dual_sot_parity_table.tightening_option_short = parity_lint scaffold; tightening_option_long = use-import 안정화 후 inline 제거). 거짓 ground 0 — selftest_coverage_boundary 의 'covered 6 / uncovered 4' 명시는 ANU branch 미시험 약점을 정직 surface.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: noise envelope module 의 physical-limit 를 (a) entropy_path_table — urandom 8 bit/invocation × 1-5ms fork+exec → 8000 bit/sec ceiling; ANU 1 req/sec rate × 1 byte × 5s timeout → 8 bit/sec hard ceiling + 5s fallback trigger; (b) subprocess_overhead_table — exec_calls_in_module=15 (grep 검증), per-3-envelope cycle ≈ 9-45ms, `--all` mode forward path 가 outer spawn 1회로 압축; (c) network_latency_table — ANU p50 200-500ms / p99 5000ms / ts ISO8601 second granularity 의 cross-channel collision UNMEASURED. HARD-bound 4종 + SOFT-bound 2종 + UNMEASURED 1종. 모든 numeric bound 에 source file:line 인용.

network_latency_table.ts_collision_within_same_second: UNMEASURED — multiple cycles within same UTC second 시 envelope ts identical

tier_1_promotions.rationale: noise envelope module 의 mathematical-limit 를 (a) hash_collision_table — sha256(input)[0:16] = 64-bit, birthday 50% threshold = 2^32 ≈ 4.29×10^9 unique inputs, current emission rate ≤100/day → safe margin 10^5; (b) mod_bias_table — α 2^32 mod 15 = 1 → 3.5×10^-9 negligible bias; γ 256 mod 16 = 0 → perfectly uniform; scaling_warning n=17 → 6.67% deviation; (c) entropy_bits_table — α 3.91 / β 8.0 / γ 4.0 (β-byte 가 mod 16 으로 collapse — 4-bit 정보 손실); (d) chi_square_detection_table — uniform 검정 sample-size requirement n=150-160 → G5 bench tool forward. HARD-bound 6종 + SOFT-bound 1종.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/noise_envelope.hexa:118-121 (_short_hash) + :119 awk substr($1,1,16) (16-hex 명시) + tool/kick_dispatch.hexa:206 (parity copy); registry counts: ls absorbed=15 + bridges=16 + qrng=1 (Bash 검증)

hash_collision_table.tightening_option: awk substr 1,1,32 → 128-bit prefix → birthday 2^64 (현재 미적용; 16-hex sentinel readability 우선)

alpha.calculation: 2^32=4294967296, 4294967296 mod 15 = 1 → 1 of 15 indices receives floor(2^32/15)+1 vs 14 receive floor → relative deviation = 1/286331153 ≈ 3.5×10^-9

gamma.calculation: 256 mod 16 = 0 → all 16 indices receive 16 byte mappings → uniform

mod_bias_table.scaling_warning_n_17: if n_bridges grows to 17: 256 mod 17 = 1 → 1 bridge receives 16 byte mappings vs 16 receive 15 → max relative deviation 1/15 ≈ 6.67%
mod_bias_table.registry_growth_monitor_forward: G5 noise_envelope_bench (prior cycle) 가 mod-bias dynamic 감시 책임

alpha.source_description: log2(n_primitives=15) — pool 선택 entropy. payload 의 ts/byte_hash 추가 entropy 는 emission-shape decision 외부성 anchor 와 분리

gamma.source_description: log2(n_bridges=16) — beta-byte mod 16 reduction; 8-bit β 가 4-bit 으로 collapse

entropy_bits_table.entropy_dilution_observation: γ 가 β-byte 의 8-bit 을 mod 16 으로 reduce — 4 bit 정보 손실. forward path: γ 가 별도 syscall (e.g. urandom 추가 byte) 사용해 entropy 보존 검토

chi_square_detection_table.calculation_basis: expected count per bin >= 5 → samples >= 5n; p<0.05 검출력 권장 5x → ~150-160
chi_square_detection_table.current_run_count_state: FORWARD — state/kick/runs/*/noise_envelopes.jsonl 누적 sample count UNMEASURED until G5 bench emits

obstructions.mitigation: post B4 (G5 bench) 측정 후, 만약 γ 분포 chi-square 가 p<0.05 reject 시 γ 가 별도 urandom 1-byte 사용 redesign — 그 시점이 P6 weight
